explanation: This command uses the original syntax from the Sigma rule and is a direct representation of an unsigned AppX installation attempt.
Omission of quotes around the command removes optional syntax while maintaining the same behavior.
Substitution of 'Add-AppPackage' (alias) for 'Add-AppxPackage' and use of 'pwsh.exe' instead of 'powershell.exe' demonstrates equivalent syntax.
Reordering the '-AllowUnsigned' flag and '-Path' argument to test if argument order affects detection.
Removal of quotes around the path to test if the absence of quotes affects detection.
